ModMetadata.Name: Stationeers Methane Combustion Fix
ModMetadata.Author: yaskovdev
ModMetadata.Description:
Fixes the incorrect methane combustion reaction:
2 CH4 + O2 -> 6 CO2 + 3 POL
by replacing it with the chemically accurate reaction:
CH4 + 2 O2 -> CO2 + 2 H2O
Notes: - Works with existing saves. - Avoids the issue of leftover methane in the welder. - Tested with the Gas Fuel Generator (GFG). Combustion reaches the expected 90% ratio. - Only changes methane + oxygen combustion.
Recommended fuel mixture: - 33% methane - 67% oxygen
Contributions, improvements, suggestions, and comments are welcome.
GitHub repository: https://github.com/yaskovdev/StationeersCombustionFix
